---
name: Question
about: Ask how something works, or get help with a setup issue
title: "question: <one-line summary>"
labels: [question]
assignees: ""
---

> **Before filing:**
> - For **security issues**, use the private channels in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md).
> - For **bugs** (incorrect or unexpected behavior), use the [Bug Report](./bug-report.md) template.
> - For **feature requests**, use the [Feature Request](./feature-request.md) template.
> - For **triage expectations**, see [SUPPORT.md](../../SUPPORT.md) (best-effort 5 business days).
> - Browse [docs/recipes/](../../docs/recipes/) first — your question may be answered by a recipe.

## What are you trying to do

<!-- The end goal in your own words. -->

## What you've tried

<!-- The approaches you've already attempted. Code snippets help. -->

```python
# What you tried
```

## What surprised you

<!-- The behavior you expected vs what you observed.
     If there was an error, paste it here. -->

```
<observed output or error>
```

## Docs you've already read

<!-- Which agenteval docs you consulted (helps the maintainer point you to the right place).
     Examples: docs/adr/README.md, docs/contracts/<name>.md, docs/recipes/<name>.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, README.md. -->
